headline: Are Boston Scientific’s (BSX) Sterile-Packaging Recalls Reframing the Narrative on Quality and Regulatory Risk?
summary: Boston Scientific recently initiated several voluntary Class II recalls of its CRE and CRE Pro Wireguided endoscopy devices worldwide due to potential sterile breaches in packaging, affecting tens of thousands of units across multiple size ranges. The recalls underscore the operational and regulatory risks inherent in Boston Scientific’s expanding minimally invasive device portfolio, especially as it integrates recent acquisitions and scales global distribution. We’ll now examine how these...
